case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE VS AZZI SHUKRALLAH DBA J AND E DELI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,516.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT AZZI SHUKRALLAH DBA J AND E DELI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
